Actions.Text: REFERRED TO ALCOHOLISM AND DRUG ABUSE
REFERRED TO ALCOHOLISM AND DRUG ABUSE
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO ALCOHOLISM AND DRUG ABUSE

Title: Relates to the distribution of educational materials regarding the misuse of and addiction to prescription drugs in counties with the most prevalent prescription substance use disorder
Summary: Relates to the distribution of educational materials regarding the misuse of and addiction to prescription drugs in counties with the most prevalent prescription substance use disorder.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the mental hygiene law, in relation to the distribution in counties with the most prevalent prescription substance use disorder of educational materials regarding the misuse of and addiction to prescription drugs
